params.rule: Stock+ETF dual-asset-class momentum ensemble. 70% stocks (top-10/15/20 by 6mo/12mo momo) + 30% ETFs (top-1 by 21d/126d momo). Gross == 1.0; no margin; no levered ETFs.
params.stock_universe_disclosure: Survivorship-biased (current large-caps with 2010+ data; bankrupt/delisted excluded). Apply 2% CAGR haircut for forward planning.
